subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses in truth, and verily He is potent over all things. The thunder doth hymn His praise in fear of Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق و انه علی کل شیء مقتدرا یسبح الرعد من خیفته و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @chastisement and requital
